ABAP Runtime Analysis
description: Measure and analyze the runtime of ABAP programs, transactions, and function modules. Useful for identifying slow logic, expensive calls, and performance bottlenecks in custom code.

name: Open Bar Codes with Keep Flag
Internal Bar Codes with Keep Flag
External Bar Codes with Keep Flag
SAP Business Workplace
description: Open the SAP inbox to process workflow workitems, notifications, and business documents assigned to the user.

name: ole Manager: Start of a Function
SAPconnect Administration
description: Maintain SAPconnect settings such as SMTP nodes, send jobs, and outbound communication configuration.

name: ole Manager: Start of a Report
CRM-Relevant IMG in PlugIn of R/3
Transport Organizer
description: Create, manage, and release Workbench transport requests. Used for ABAP objects, programs, and repository objects.

name: Customizing Transport Organizer
description: Manage Customizing transport requests. Used for configuration and IMG settings.

name: ABAP Data Dictionary
description: Display and maintain ABAP Dictionary objects: tables, structures, data elements, domains, and search helps.

name: General Table Display
description: Display the contents of any SAP database table or view. Useful for checking configuration, master data, and document tables.

name: ABAP Editor
description: Create, edit, and execute ABAP programs and reports. Check source code and run programs directly.

name: Object Navigator
description: Browse and manage all SAP development repository objects: programs, function groups, classes, interfaces, and more.

name: New SysLog Msg Maintenance as of 46
OData Service Builder
description: Build and maintain OData services in SAP Gateway. Define entity types, associations, and service operations.

name: Init. screen of cust. maint. interf
HTTP Service Configuration
description: Activate, deactivate, and configure Internet Communication Framework (ICF) services. Required for OData, Fiori, and web services.

name: PAW - Test Results Transfer  to HR
PAW - Show comments for test items
Application Log
description: Display application logs written by SAP programs and interfaces. Useful when a process failed but there is no short dump and the business transaction gives limited information.

name: Lock Entry List
description: Display and delete SAP enqueue lock entries. Use when a table entry is stuck locked after a failed transaction.

name: Update Requests
description: Display failed or pending SAP update requests. Essential for diagnosing transactions that appeared to save but were not committed to the database.

name: System Log
description: View the SAP system log. Track system-level errors, failed logons, updates, and critical events across all clients.

name: View Maintenance
description: Maintain table view contents through generated maintenance dialogs. Commonly used for configuration tables and custom control tables when direct IMG navigation is not available.

name: Background Job Overview
description: Monitor, analyze, and manage background jobs. Check job status, view job logs, cancel or reschedule jobs.

name: Work Process Overview
description: Monitor all active work processes in the current application server. Check for hung or long-running processes.

name: SAP Servers
description: Display all active application servers in the SAP system and jump to administration functions on a selected instance.

name: Transactional RFC Monitor
description: Monitor transactional RFC (tRFC) calls that are waiting, failed, or not yet delivered to the target system. Useful when asynchronous RFC processing is delayed or stuck.

name: RFC Destinations
description: Configure and test RFC (Remote Function Call) connections to other SAP systems or external services.

name: Global Work Process Overview
description: Monitor work processes across all application servers. Used for system-wide performance checks.

name: qRFC Monitor (Outbound Queue)
description: Monitor outbound qRFC queues. Use when messages or queued calls are stuck before leaving the source system.

name: qRFC Monitor (Inbound Queue)
description: Monitor inbound qRFC queues. Use when messages arrived in the target system but are stuck waiting for processing.

name: Getting Started with the R/3 System
SAPconnect Send Requests
description: Monitor outbound emails, faxes, and other SAPconnect messages. Check whether messages are waiting, failed, or already sent.

name: Output Controller
description: Display and manage spool requests and print output. Use when a report ran but the expected output is missing, stuck, or not printed.

name: Customizing / IMG
description: Access the Implementation Guide (IMG) for SAP configuration. Navigate to configuration activities by module.

name: Text elem. maint. for print formats
xport User Roles to XML doc.
System Trace
description: Run a system trace for authorization checks, RFC calls, kernel operations, and more. Especially useful when SU53 is not enough to explain why access failed.

name: Workload and Performance Analysis
description: Analyze workload, response times, transaction performance, and system activity over time. Useful for identifying slow transactions and performance hotspots.

name: Performance Trace
description: Trace SQL, RFC, enqueue, and buffer accesses for a transaction or user session. Used for detailed technical performance investigation.

name: ABAP Runtime Error Analysis
description: Display and analyze ABAP short dumps (runtime errors). Investigate program crashes with full stack trace and variable contents.

name: Transport Management System
description: Manage the transport landscape, import queues, and perform imports across systems. Check import logs.

name: Trust Manager
description: Maintain SSL certificates and trust relationships used by SAP for HTTPS, web services, and secure outbound connections.

name: User Maintenance
description: Create, modify, or display SAP user accounts. Manage logon data, roles, profiles, and lock status.

name: Mass User Maintenance
description: Maintain multiple SAP users at once. Useful for mass unlocks, role assignments, validity changes, and password administration across many users.

name: Maintain Authorization Defaults
description: Maintain authorization check indicators and default authorization proposals for transactions, reports, and services. Useful when building or correcting role content in PFCG.

name: Authorization Check
description: Display the last failed authorization check for a user. Essential first step when a user reports an access or permission error.

name: Internal call: Submit via commnd fl
User Information System
description: Search users, roles, profiles, and authorization assignments. Useful for analyzing who has access to a transaction, role, or authorization object.

name: View for activity in Procedure Mode
Workflow Log / Selection Report
description: Display workflow instances and their detailed execution logs. Useful for understanding where a workflow failed or stopped.

name: Workload Analysis for Workflow
description: Analyze workflow workitems by task, agent, or status. Identify stuck, unprocessed, or error workflow items.

name: Execute Workitem Administratively
description: Execute, forward, or complete a workflow workitem with administrator rights. Used to unblock stuck workflows.
